title: NMT Strategies for Low-Resource Language Pairs
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision process and methodologies for building a Neural Machine Translation (NMT) system when parallel training data is scarce.
elements: Model-Centric Solutions (e.g., Transfer Learning, Multilingual NMT)
relationships: Starts with the problem of limited parallel data, leads to a choice of strategies, which are implemented to create a functional system
